fields.description:
250 – 260 gsm
100% combed ring-spun cotton
Pique knit
Compacted Pre-shrunk
Double needle stitch on the shoulder, sleeves and bottom hem
3 Button placket with dyed to match buttons and bottom
Soft flow dyed
Color fastness Guaranteed

220 – 230 GSM
100% combed ring-spun cotton
Pique knit
Compacted Pre-shrunk
Double needle stitch on the shoulder, sleeves and bottom hem
3 Button placket with dyed to match buttons and bottom
Soft flow dyed colour fastness guaranteed
Contrast bands on the collar and cuffs
Contrast Jacquard neck tape and side slit tape

220 – 230 gsm (6.8 Ounces)
100% combed ring-spun cotton
Pique knit
Compacted Pre-shrunk
Double needle stitch on the shoulder, sleeves and bottom hem
3 Button placket with dyed to match buttons and bottom
Soft flow dyed
Colour fastness Guaranteed
